title: Turboot's Horrorpack
description: Dive into the immersive horror modpack. With multiple scary horror mods and scary atmospheres.
body:
## Turboot's Horror Modpack

With this modpack you will feel a full immersive horror experience in Minecraft! With multiple excited horror mods and scary atmospheres and shaders.

Server IP: **mc.turboot.com**

---

### Socials:

- [Turboot Website](https://turboot.com 'Turboot Website')
